skill_changes.reason: The task setup service prepares document-processing dependencies, so executor-facing docs were changed to avoid asking the model to run npm install during the task.

Replaces the prior file-organizer-zh injection (extension-based file classifier — irrelevant for the prompt's content-based topic classification). document-pro provides Chinese-localized DOCX content extraction with python-docx code patterns that are directly useful for reading paragraph/table text and inferring topic labels from 150 mixed Word documents.
